items.title: Hawks' Onyeka Okongwu: Set up as top center again
items.author: CBS Sports
items.body_excerpt: Hawks' Onyeka Okongwu: Set up as top center again CBS Sports

items.title: Could be great value for the Hawks with Henri Veesaar. They need size around Onyeka Okongwu and this late in the draft, this is a really good upside pick.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: Could be great value for the Hawks with Henri Veesaar. They need size around Onyeka Okongwu and this late in the draft, this is a really good upside pick.
